manifest.name: Heading Shift

name: Heading Shift

releases.author: MaleleStudySpace
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

### Fence detection error (root cause)
When scanning code block fences, lines with language specifiers (e.g. ` ```python `) were incorrectly treated as closing fences. This caused the code block range to be miscalculated, making subsequent headings undetected.

**Fix**: Strictly follow CommonMark spec. A closing fence must satisfy all:
- Same fence character
- Fence length >= opening fence length
- **No info string (language tag)**

### Wrong heading targeted
`getCursor("from")` returns the selection anchor (start) instead of the cursor position when there is a selection, causing the plugin to operate on the wrong heading.

### Cursor jumps after operation
Manually calling `setCursor` after `transaction` conflicted with CM6's selection mapping, causing the cursor to jump to an unexpected line.

**Fix**: Removed `setCursor` — let CM6 map the cursor naturally through document changes.
releases.name: v1.0.1

releases.author: MaleleStudySpace
releases.description:
Initial release

- Promote heading (remove #) with all sub-headings
- Demote heading (add #) with all sub-headings  
- Skip headings inside code fences
- Preserve cursor position and scroll viewport
